categories.name: enhancement
categories.description: New feature or improvement to existing behavior.

triageStates.name: needs-info
triageStates.description: Reporter must supply missing details before this can be triaged.

triageStates.name: ready-for-agent
triageStates.description: Fully specified and delegable to automation. The Sandcastle daemon picks these up.

triageStates.name: ready-for-human
triageStates.description: Requires human judgment or external access; not suitable for an agent.

agentStates.name: agent-working
agentStates.description: Sandcastle agent is currently running against this issue.

agentStates.name: agent-pr-open
agentStates.description: Sandcastle opened a PR for this issue. Awaiting review/merge.

agentStates.name: agent-failed
agentStates.description: Sandcastle run errored or produced no commits. Relabel to ready-for-agent to retry.
